description_zh: MAC Cosmetics（魅可）是全球最具影响力的专业彩妆品牌之一，由Frank Toskan（专业化妆师）和Frank Angelo（美发沙龙主理人）于1984年在加拿大多伦多创立。品牌名称是"Make-Up Art Cosmetics"的缩写，从创立之初就定位为专业化妆师打造的专业彩妆线。MAC率先打破传统化妆品行业的色彩界限，推出覆盖极广的色号选择，涵盖各种肤色需求，这种包容性理念在20世纪80年代具有革命性意义。品牌以其高饱和度色彩、卓越配方以及对多元化的执着而著称，尤其因其口红、眼影盘和粉底液系列备受赞誉。MAC秉持"All Ages, All Races, All Sexes"的核心理念，是最早在广告中倡导性别平等和多元化的美妆品牌之一。品牌旗下Viva Glam系列口红更是将全部收益捐赠给抗击艾滋病的慈善事业，成为美妆行业公益营销的经典案例。1994年MAC被雅诗兰黛集团收购，如今在全球120多个国家和地区设有专柜。

languages.en: MAC Cosmetics (Make-Up Art Cosmetics) is a globally renowned professional makeup brand founded in 1984 by Frank Toskan and Frank Angelo in Toronto, Canada. Known for revolutionizing the cosmetics industry with its extensive shade range catering to all skin tones, MAC broke racial and gender barriers with its inclusive 'All Ages, All Races, All Sexes' philosophy. The brand is celebrated for high-pigment lipsticks, eyeshadows, and foundations that became industry staples among professional makeup artists. MAC's Viva Glam lipstick line, which donates 100% of proceeds to HIV/AIDS charities, set a benchmark for cause-driven beauty marketing. Acquired by Estée Lauder Companies in 1994, MAC now operates in over 120 countries and remains a definitive voice in makeup artistry, self-expression, and social inclusivity.
